title: artemisia marschalliana var. sericophylla
intro: Artemisia marschalliana var. sericophylla, also known as Chinese wormwood, is a variety of the Artemisia marschalliana plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and antihelmintic properties, which have been attributed to its high content of artemisinin. The health benefits of Chinese wormwood include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of malaria, and act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Chinese wormwood is often prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
